reviews: Walked into Nayan Optics on a whim and walked out with the perfect pair of glasses. The staff was incredibly patient, helping me try on frame after frame until we found the right one. The eye test was thorough and the optometrist explained every detail of my prescription. Delivery was faster than expected and the fit is flawless. Highly recommend to anyone in the area.

Getting new glasses has never been this easy. The team at Nayan Optics guided me through their entire collection without any pressure. They suggested frames that actually suited my face shape, which I really appreciated. The lens quality is outstanding and my vision has never been clearer. Will definitely be coming back for my next pair.

After years of struggling with ill-fitting glasses from other shops, Nayan Optics finally got it right. The optometrist took extra time to ensure my prescription was perfectly accurate. The frame selection is excellent — something for every budget and style. My new glasses arrived quickly and the quality exceeded my expectations. Five stars all the way.

Brought my elderly father here for new reading glasses and the experience was wonderful. The staff was patient and gentle, taking all the time he needed during the eye exam. They explained the different lens options clearly and helped us choose the best one for his needs. He is absolutely delighted with his new glasses. Thank you, Nayan Optics!

The collection of frames at Nayan Optics is genuinely impressive. I spent a good hour trying on different styles and the staff never once made me feel rushed. The computerized eye test was quick and accurate. My new glasses were ready sooner than promised and the vision clarity is exceptional. This is now my go-to optical shop.

Needed new glasses urgently after my old pair broke. Nayan Optics came through brilliantly. The staff assessed my needs quickly, helped me pick a sturdy frame, and had my new glasses ready in no time. The quality is superb and the price was very reasonable. Exactly the kind of reliable service you hope to find.

My prescription had changed significantly and I was worried about adjusting to new lenses. The optometrist at Nayan Optics was incredibly reassuring, explaining exactly what had changed and why. The new glasses feel completely natural and my eye strain has disappeared entirely. The staff's expertise and care made all the difference.

Nayan Optics has the best frame selection I have seen in this city. From budget-friendly options to premium branded frames, they have it all. The staff is knowledgeable and honest — they told me which frames suited me rather than just pushing the expensive ones. My new glasses are stylish, comfortable, and perfectly fitted.

First time getting glasses and I was quite nervous about the whole process. The team at Nayan Optics made it completely stress-free. They explained every step of the eye exam, helped me understand my prescription, and guided me to frames that worked for my lifestyle. The final result is a pair of glasses I genuinely love wearing.

Switched to Nayan Optics after a bad experience elsewhere and the difference is night and day. The eye examination here is thorough and uses modern equipment. The staff listens to what you actually want rather than pushing their own agenda. My new progressive lenses are perfectly calibrated and I have had zero adjustment issues. Absolutely outstanding service.

Dropped by Nayan Optics to replace my scratched lenses and ended up upgrading my entire frame as well. The staff showed me some beautiful new arrivals that I would never have found on my own. The whole process was smooth and the new glasses look fantastic. The price was fair and the turnaround was impressively quick.

My daughter needed her first pair of glasses and I was worried she would resist wearing them. The team at Nayan Optics was brilliant with her — they let her pick her own frames from a special kids' section and made the whole experience feel exciting rather than scary. She loves her new glasses and wears them happily every day.

The anti-glare coating on my new lenses from Nayan Optics has completely transformed my night driving. The optometrist recommended it specifically for my lifestyle and they were absolutely right. The difference is remarkable. The frames are also incredibly lightweight — I sometimes forget I am wearing glasses at all.

Came in for a routine prescription update and left with a pair of glasses that genuinely changed how I see the world. The optometrist at Nayan Optics identified a small astigmatism correction that my previous shop had missed for years. The new lenses are so much clearer. I cannot believe I waited this long to come here.

The staff at Nayan Optics took one look at my old glasses and immediately spotted that the frame was wrong for my face shape. They spent time showing me alternatives and the difference is remarkable. My new pair sits perfectly, looks great, and the lenses are crystal clear. This is what proper optical care looks like.

Ordered progressive lenses for the first time and was nervous about the adjustment period. The optometrist at Nayan Optics set my expectations perfectly and the lenses were calibrated so well that I adapted within a day. The frame they recommended is also incredibly comfortable for long work sessions. Genuinely impressed.

The blue-light blocking lenses I got from Nayan Optics have made a huge difference to my screen fatigue. The optometrist asked about my daily routine before recommending them, which showed real care. The frames are stylish enough to wear in meetings and comfortable enough for a full day at the desk. Excellent all round.

Nayan Optics replaced my broken glasses with a new pair that is even better than the original. The staff matched my old prescription perfectly and helped me find a frame that was more durable. The whole process took less time than I expected and the price was very fair. This is my permanent optical shop from now on.

The eye test at Nayan Optics was the most thorough I have ever had. The optometrist used multiple techniques to confirm my prescription and explained every reading in plain language. The frames they recommended based on my face shape are perfect. I have received so many compliments on my new glasses. Highly recommend.

Visited Nayan Optics for the first time based on a colleague's recommendation and I am so glad I did. The shop is well-organised, the staff is welcoming, and the frame selection is excellent. My new glasses were ready the same day and the fit is perfect. The price was very competitive for the quality. Will be back.

My son had been complaining about blurry vision at school for months. Brought him to Nayan Optics and the optometrist was wonderful with him — patient, thorough, and great at explaining things to a child. The prescription was spot on and his new glasses have made a real difference to his schoolwork. So glad we came here.

Tried three other optical shops before finding Nayan Optics and the difference in quality is remarkable. The eye examination here is genuinely comprehensive and the staff takes time to understand your specific needs. My new titanium frames are incredibly lightweight and the lenses are perfectly clear. Worth every rupee.

The optometrist at Nayan Optics spent nearly an hour with me getting my progressive lens prescription exactly right. They explained the different zones of the lens and how to use them effectively. The adjustment period was minimal because the calibration was so precise. Outstanding professional service.

Came in looking for budget-friendly frames and left with a pair that looks far more expensive than it was. The staff at Nayan Optics has a real eye for what suits different face shapes and they guided me to options I would never have considered. The lens quality is excellent regardless of price point.

My reading glasses had become so scratched I could barely see through them. Nayan Optics replaced the lenses in my existing frame and the result is like having brand new glasses. The process was quick, the price was fair, and the clarity is perfect. Great to know I do not always need to buy a whole new pair.

The children's glasses section at Nayan Optics is fantastic. There is a wide range of durable, flexible frames designed specifically for active kids. The staff was brilliant with my eight-year-old, making the whole experience fun. The glasses have survived several months of rough use and still look great.

Nayan Optics is the only place I trust for my annual eye check and new glasses. The optometrist tracks my prescription history and notices subtle changes that other shops have missed. This year they caught a slight increase in my astigmatism and the new lenses are noticeably clearer. Consistent, excellent care.

The frame fitting service at Nayan Optics is exceptional. After I chose my frames, the technician made several small adjustments to ensure they sat perfectly on my face. The nose pads were positioned just right and the temple arms were adjusted for my head size. This level of attention to detail is rare.

Ordered a pair of glasses with high-index lenses because my prescription is quite strong. The staff at Nayan Optics explained the different index options clearly and helped me choose the right one to keep the lenses thin. The result is a pair of glasses that looks completely normal despite my strong prescription.

The anti-scratch coating on my new lenses from Nayan Optics is noticeably better than what I had before. The optometrist recommended a premium coating package and it has been worth every extra rupee. Six months in and the lenses still look brand new. Excellent advice and excellent quality.

Brought my mother-in-law for new bifocal glasses and the staff handled the consultation beautifully. They were patient, spoke clearly, and made sure she understood all her options. The bifocals were calibrated perfectly and she has had no adjustment issues at all. Wonderful service for senior customers.

The same-day glasses service at Nayan Optics is genuinely impressive. Came in at noon and had my new prescription glasses by evening. The quality is not compromised at all — the lenses are perfectly clear and the frame fits beautifully. This kind of efficiency is rare in optical shops.

My prescription is quite complex with both myopia and astigmatism corrections. The optometrist at Nayan Optics took extra care to get every parameter exactly right. The new lenses are the clearest I have ever had. I can finally read small text without straining. Exceptional technical skill.

The staff at Nayan Optics helped me choose frames that work for both my professional and casual life. They suggested a versatile style that looks equally good in the office and on weekends. The quality of the frames and lenses is outstanding. I have been wearing them every day for three months and they still look perfect.

Nayan Optics has an excellent range of branded frames at prices that are much more reasonable than dedicated brand stores. The staff verified the authenticity of the frames I was interested in and gave me honest comparisons. My new branded frames look and feel premium. Great value for money.

The photochromic lenses I got from Nayan Optics are perfect for my lifestyle — I move between indoor and outdoor environments constantly. The optometrist explained exactly how they work and what to expect. The transition speed is excellent and the lenses look completely clear indoors. Best lens upgrade I have made.

Came to Nayan Optics after my optometrist referred me for glasses. The staff was already familiar with the type of prescription I had and guided me efficiently. The whole process from eye test to frame selection to collection took less than two hours. The glasses are perfect and the service was seamless.

The kids' glasses at Nayan Optics come with flexible frames that can handle the rough and tumble of school life. My son has dropped his glasses multiple times and they have bounced back perfectly. The lenses are also impact-resistant. The staff recommended this specific type and they were absolutely right.

My new glasses from Nayan Optics have completely eliminated the headaches I was getting every afternoon. The optometrist identified that my old prescription was slightly off and corrected it precisely. The difference was noticeable from the very first day. I wish I had come here years ago.

The staff at Nayan Optics never made me feel like I had to spend more than my budget. They showed me excellent options at every price point and were honest about the differences. I ended up with a pair that looks great and fits my budget perfectly. This is how optical shopping should feel.

Nayan Optics fitted me with my first pair of progressive lenses and the experience was excellent from start to finish. The optometrist explained the technology clearly, the frame recommendation was perfect, and the calibration was so precise that I adapted within hours. Highly recommend for anyone making the switch to progressives.

The lens quality at Nayan Optics is consistently excellent. I have bought three pairs here over the past two years and each time the clarity has been outstanding. The staff remembers my preferences and makes the process faster each visit. This is the kind of relationship you want with your optical shop.

Came in for a second opinion on a prescription that had been giving me trouble. The optometrist at Nayan Optics identified the issue immediately — the cylinder axis was slightly wrong. After the correction, my new glasses are perfect. The thoroughness here is genuinely impressive.

The frame selection at Nayan Optics includes some beautiful handcrafted acetate frames that I have not seen anywhere else in the city. The staff was knowledgeable about the materials and construction. My new acetate frames are sturdy, beautiful, and incredibly comfortable. A real find.

My teenage daughter was very particular about how her glasses would look. The staff at Nayan Optics was incredibly patient, letting her try on dozens of frames and giving honest feedback. She finally found a pair she loves and wears them proudly. The prescription is perfect and the quality is excellent.

The eye examination at Nayan Optics includes a retinal health check that most shops skip. The optometrist explained what they were looking for and why it matters. Everything was healthy, but I appreciated the thoroughness. This is comprehensive eye care, not just a prescription service.

Nayan Optics sorted out my glasses in record time when I needed them urgently for a work trip. The staff prioritized my order without any fuss and the quality was not compromised at all. The frames I chose are perfect for professional settings and the lenses are crystal clear. Saved my trip.

The staff at Nayan Optics genuinely listens to what you want. I described the kind of glasses I was looking for and they immediately pulled out several options that matched my description perfectly. No time wasted on unsuitable frames. The whole experience was efficient and enjoyable.

My new glasses from Nayan Optics are the first pair I have ever had that I actually enjoy wearing. The frame suits my face perfectly and the lenses are so clear that I notice details I was missing before. The optometrist's prescription accuracy is exceptional. Highly recommend.

The after-sales service at Nayan Optics is as good as the initial purchase experience. When one of my nose pads came loose a month after buying, they fixed it immediately at no charge. This kind of ongoing care is what makes a shop truly excellent.

Nayan Optics helped me transition from contact lenses to glasses for the first time in years. The staff was understanding about my concerns and helped me find frames that I felt confident wearing. The prescription was perfectly matched to my contact lens power. The whole experience was much better than I expected.

The UV protection coating on my new lenses from Nayan Optics is excellent. The optometrist explained the importance of UV protection for eye health and recommended the right coating for my lifestyle. The lenses are also anti-reflective which makes a huge difference for screen work. Very happy with the upgrade.

Came to Nayan Optics specifically for their progressive lens expertise and was not disappointed. The optometrist spent considerable time measuring the exact parameters needed for my progressive prescription. The result is a pair of glasses with no distortion and a wide, clear reading zone. Exceptional work.

The staff at Nayan Optics helped my elderly mother choose reading glasses that she can actually find when she needs them — bright, distinctive frames that stand out. They also made sure the prescription was exactly right for her reading distance. She is delighted and so am I.

My new glasses from Nayan Optics have transformed my experience of watching cricket. The optometrist corrected a small astigmatism that I had not known about and the difference in clarity is remarkable. I can now follow the ball easily from the stands. Excellent prescription accuracy.

The frame adjustment service at Nayan Optics after purchase is excellent. They made several tweaks to ensure my new glasses sat perfectly before I left the shop. The technician was skilled and thorough. This attention to the final fit is something many shops skip but it makes a real difference.

Nayan Optics has a wonderful selection of lightweight frames for people who find glasses uncomfortable. The staff understood my concern immediately and showed me several ultra-light options. My new frames weigh almost nothing and I can wear them all day without any discomfort. Life-changing.

The prescription accuracy at Nayan Optics is consistently excellent. I have been coming here for four years and every pair of glasses has been perfectly calibrated. The optometrist is thorough and methodical, never rushing the examination. This is the standard all optical shops should aim for.

Brought my six-year-old for her first eye test and the staff at Nayan Optics was wonderful with her. They made the whole process feel like an adventure and she was completely at ease. The prescription was accurate and the children's frames selection is excellent. She loves her new glasses.

The staff at Nayan Optics noticed that my old glasses had a slight tint that I had not asked for and was affecting my colour perception. They corrected this in my new prescription and the difference is remarkable. I had no idea how much the tint was affecting my vision. Excellent observation.

My new glasses from Nayan Optics are the first pair that has ever been truly comfortable for extended wear. The frame fits perfectly, the nose pads are positioned correctly, and the lenses are exactly the right weight. The staff took considerable care with the fitting. Highly recommend.

The optometrist at Nayan Optics explained my prescription in a way that finally made sense to me. I now understand what each number means and why the corrections are needed. This kind of patient education is rare and very much appreciated. The glasses themselves are also excellent.

Nayan Optics stocked a frame style I had been searching for everywhere. The staff knew exactly which of their frames matched what I was describing and brought them out immediately. The lenses were fitted perfectly and the glasses were ready quickly. Exactly the experience I was hoping for.

The quality control at Nayan Optics is impressive. Before handing over my new glasses, the staff checked the prescription, the fit, and the lens quality carefully. They noticed a tiny imperfection in one lens and replaced it without any fuss. This kind of thoroughness gives real confidence.

My new glasses from Nayan Optics have made reading so much more comfortable. The optometrist identified that I needed a slight reading addition that my previous prescription had not included. The difference is remarkable — I can read for hours without any eye strain. Excellent diagnostic skill.

The staff at Nayan Optics helped me choose frames that complement my skin tone as well as my face shape. This level of styling advice is something I did not expect from an optical shop. The result is a pair of glasses that I feel genuinely confident wearing. Excellent service.

Nayan Optics is the only shop where I have never had to return glasses because of a prescription error. The optometrist is meticulous and the quality checks are thorough. Three pairs over three years and every single one has been perfect from day one. Remarkable consistency.

The staff at Nayan Optics helped me understand the difference between various lens coatings and which ones were actually worth paying for. Their honest advice saved me money while ensuring I got the coatings that genuinely benefit my lifestyle. The new glasses are excellent.

My new glasses from Nayan Optics arrived with a beautiful hard case and cleaning cloth included. The staff showed me how to clean and store the glasses properly to extend their life. These small touches show that they genuinely care about the customer experience beyond just the sale.

The optometrist at Nayan Optics detected a slight difference between my two eyes that had not been corrected in my previous prescription. The new balanced prescription has eliminated the subtle headaches I had been getting. I am amazed at the difference such a small correction can make.

Nayan Optics has an excellent range of frames for people with narrow faces. I have always struggled to find glasses that fit properly but the staff here knew exactly which styles would work for me. My new glasses fit perfectly and look great. Finally found my optical shop.

The staff at Nayan Optics is genuinely passionate about eyewear. They talked about the different frame materials, lens technologies, and coating options with real enthusiasm and knowledge. This expertise made choosing my new glasses much easier and more enjoyable. Excellent experience.

My new progressive glasses from Nayan Optics are the best I have ever had. The optometrist took precise measurements for the progressive fitting and the result is a lens with no distortion and a generous reading zone. I adapted within hours. The frame recommendation was also perfect.

Came to Nayan Optics for a simple lens replacement and the staff noticed that my frame was also showing signs of wear. They pointed this out honestly and helped me choose a new frame that was even better. The whole upgrade was very reasonably priced. Honest and helpful service.

The eye examination at Nayan Optics is thorough enough to catch things that other shops miss. The optometrist found a small but significant change in my prescription that had been causing subtle eye strain. The new glasses have made a noticeable difference to my comfort. Excellent diagnostic care.

Nayan Optics helped me find glasses that work well with my hearing aids — a combination that is surprisingly tricky to get right. The staff understood the challenge immediately and showed me frames with slim temple arms that do not interfere with the hearing aid. Perfect solution.

The staff at Nayan Optics remembered my preferences from my last visit two years ago. They pulled out frames in the style I like and had my prescription on file. The whole process was much faster because of this continuity. This is the kind of personalised service that keeps customers loyal.

My new glasses from Nayan Optics have the best lens clarity I have ever experienced. The optometrist recommended a premium lens brand and the difference compared to my previous glasses is immediately obvious. Everything is sharper, clearer, and more defined. Worth the extra investment.

The staff at Nayan Optics helped my teenage son choose glasses that he actually wants to wear. They showed him frames that were stylish and age-appropriate, and he was genuinely excited about his choice. The prescription is perfect and he wears them without any complaints. Excellent service for young customers.

Nayan Optics sorted out a complex prescription for me that includes both distance and near corrections with a significant astigmatism component. The optometrist was meticulous and the result is a pair of glasses that is perfectly clear at all distances. Exceptional technical expertise.

The staff at Nayan Optics gave me genuinely useful advice about lens care that has extended the life of my glasses significantly. They recommended a specific cleaning solution and showed me the correct technique. Small things, but they show a level of care that goes beyond just making a sale.

My new glasses from Nayan Optics are the first pair I have had that does not leave marks on my nose. The staff adjusted the nose pads to distribute the weight evenly and the difference in comfort is remarkable. This kind of careful fitting is what sets Nayan Optics apart.

The optometrist at Nayan Optics explained that my frequent headaches were caused by a small but uncorrected prism imbalance between my eyes. The new prescription with the prism correction has eliminated the headaches completely. I am so grateful for this diagnosis.

Nayan Optics has a wonderful selection of eco-friendly frames made from sustainable materials. The staff was knowledgeable about the environmental credentials of different options. My new bamboo frames are lightweight, stylish, and I feel good about the choice. Great to see this kind of range.

The staff at Nayan Optics helped me choose glasses that transition seamlessly between my work and social life. The frames are professional enough for the office but stylish enough for evenings out. The lens quality is excellent and the fit is perfect. Exactly what I was looking for.

My new glasses from Nayan Optics have made driving at night so much safer. The anti-reflective coating eliminates the halos around headlights that I had been experiencing. The optometrist recommended this coating specifically for my night driving concerns. Excellent advice.

The staff at Nayan Optics is patient with customers who take a long time to decide. I spent nearly two hours trying on frames and they never once made me feel like I was taking too long. The pair I finally chose is perfect and I am glad I took the time. Wonderful service.

Nayan Optics provided excellent service for my entire family in a single visit. My wife, my son, and I all got eye tests and new glasses. The staff managed all three consultations efficiently and each of us left with perfectly fitted glasses. Excellent family-friendly service.

The staff at Nayan Optics helped me understand why my previous glasses were causing eye strain despite being a recent prescription. They identified that the optical centres of the lenses were not aligned correctly with my pupils. The new glasses, fitted correctly, are completely comfortable.

My new glasses from Nayan Optics are the most stylish I have ever owned. The staff has a genuine flair for matching frames to faces and they found a style for me that I would never have chosen on my own. The prescription is perfect and I have received countless compliments.

The optometrist at Nayan Optics is the first one who has ever explained to me why my prescription changes every year. They described the natural progression of myopia and what to expect in the future. This kind of patient education makes me feel genuinely cared for.

Nayan Optics handled my complex prescription with expertise and care. I have a high minus power with significant astigmatism and finding glasses that look good is always a challenge. The staff recommended high-index lenses and a frame style that minimises the lens thickness. The result is excellent.

The staff at Nayan Optics helped me choose a second pair of glasses as a backup. They suggested a different style that complements my primary pair and the price for the second pair was very reasonable. Having a backup has already saved me twice. Practical and helpful advice.

My new glasses from Nayan Optics have the most comfortable nose pads I have ever experienced. The staff explained that silicone nose pads are gentler on the skin and adjusted them to the perfect angle. No more red marks or discomfort after a long day of wearing glasses.

The optometrist at Nayan Optics took the time to explain the difference between single vision and progressive lenses in detail before recommending progressives for my age and prescription. The explanation helped me make an informed decision and the progressives have been excellent.

Nayan Optics is the only optical shop I have found that stocks frames wide enough for my face. The staff knew exactly which styles would work and did not waste my time with unsuitable options. My new glasses fit perfectly and look great. Finally found the right shop.

The staff at Nayan Optics helped me choose glasses that work well with my active lifestyle. They recommended a frame with spring hinges that can flex without breaking and impact-resistant lenses. The glasses have survived several months of sport and outdoor activities without any issues.

My new glasses from Nayan Optics came with a two-year warranty on the frames. The staff explained the warranty terms clearly and registered my purchase. This kind of after-sales assurance is something I have not found at other optical shops. Excellent customer care.

The optometrist at Nayan Optics identified that I had been squinting to compensate for an uncorrected astigmatism. The new prescription has eliminated the squinting and the associated eye strain. My eyes feel relaxed for the first time in years. Excellent diagnostic work.

Nayan Optics provided a genuinely personalised service from start to finish. The staff remembered my name from a previous visit, asked about how my last pair had been working, and used that feedback to improve the new prescription. This continuity of care is exceptional.

The staff at Nayan Optics helped me choose frames that are appropriate for my profession as a teacher. They understood that I need glasses that look authoritative but are also comfortable for a full day of wear. The pair they recommended is perfect for the classroom.

My new glasses from Nayan Optics have the best anti-fog coating I have ever had. The staff recommended it knowing that I wear a mask regularly. The lenses stay clear even when I am wearing a mask for hours. Practical advice that has made a real difference to my daily life.

The optometrist at Nayan Optics spent extra time with my prescription because I had been experiencing double vision occasionally. They identified a small convergence issue and prescribed a slight prism correction. The double vision has completely resolved. Excellent diagnostic skill.

Nayan Optics has been my family's optical shop for five years and the quality and service have been consistently excellent throughout. The staff knows our prescriptions, our preferences, and our budgets. This kind of long-term relationship with a shop is rare and very valuable.

The staff at Nayan Optics helped me choose glasses that I can wear comfortably while working at a computer all day. They recommended a specific lens design optimised for intermediate distances and the difference in comfort is remarkable. My eye strain has reduced significantly.

My new glasses from Nayan Optics are the first pair that has ever been truly comfortable behind my ears. The staff adjusted the temple arms to the perfect length and angle. No more soreness after a long day of wearing glasses. This level of fitting care is what makes Nayan Optics special.
